name: Limer LP mGKC/mTTDC
description: Liquidity provider token for the mGKC/mTTDC Limer AMM pool (canonical order inverted — mGKC is token A because its mint pubkey sorts lexicographically before mTTDC). Held by LPs in proportion to their share of pool reserves. Earns 0.30% trading fees via reserve growth. Mint authority: pool_authority PDA (non-rotatable). Burn to withdraw pro-rata pool reserves.
